entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `intensity` REAL NOT NULL, `recordedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_intensity_records_recordedAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_intensity_records_recordedAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`recordedAt`)
